$comment: scripts/ChampionsRoom.asm — walking in is the trigger, not talking: beating AGATHA arms SCRIPT_CHAMPIONSROOM_PLAYER_ENTERS, and the next load marches the player up to the rival. Without it he can be walked around — the Hall of Fame stairs at (3,0)/(4,0) are reachable from the door. The armed script pointer is consumed by the walk-in.
